name: Tealwood Transportation

notes: No USDOT match for 'Tealwood Transportation' in SAFER keyword search (results: Tealwood Care Centers/Sauk Rapids MN, Tealwood Executive Transport LLC/Neenah WI, Tealwood Management LLC/Andover MN — none match Grand Meadow address). A 'Tealwood Transportation' listing surfaces in Northome, MN 56661 (11995 Main St; PO Box 138; ph 218-897-5302/5616) but this is different from the rank-2236 Grand Meadow address (210 2nd St SE #4). Likely intrastate-only operator with no FMCSA USDOT; possible misclassification or DBA. Grand Meadow MN is dominated by Valley Transportation Service Inc (USDOT 456821). Likely no USDOT (intrastate).

name: Aries Transportation LLC

Phone (423) 600-9191; email ariestransport3@gmail.com. Likely no USDOT (intrastate NEMT).

name: Bananas Joe Park PL Limosne Co
entity_status: active (operating per Yelp Nov 2025; CitySquares listing)
registry_source: WA Corporations and Charities Filings System (ccfs.sos.wa.gov) - not directly queried; entity referenced in CitySquares/Yelp listings as Joe Banana's Park Place Limousine Inc
notes: Listed name appears to be a garbled rendering of 'Joe Banana's Park Place Limousine Inc' (limousine company, not school bus). Operating address per CitySquares: 1520 NE 146th St, Shoreline WA 98155-7210; phone (206) 367-7404. Mailing address per rank-2243 (PO Box 27456, Seattle WA 98165) is consistent with Shoreline/north Seattle. SAFER keyword searches for 'JOE BANANA', 'PARK PLACE LIMO', 'BANANAS' returned no Washington matches (only NC septic-tank op JOE PARKS USDOT 2520299 and unrelated WA carriers like Shoreline Limousine LLC USDOT 2464187). Two related-name historical records (PARK PLACE LIMOUSINE SERVICE LLC USDOT 937837 and USDOT 2209568) are both INACTIVE in SAFER. Likely no current USDOT (intrastate WA limousine service).

name: I K S Transportation Inc
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services Business Name Search (njportal.com/DOR/BusinessNameSearch) - direct search portal not accessible; OpenCorporates US-NJ no direct hit
notes: No USDOT match in SAFER. Keyword search for 'I K S' returned only 'I K S TRANSPORT' USDOT 3512641 in Longview TX (clearly different — Texas, freight). Other IKS-prefix carriers (IKS Transport ME, IKS Trucking TX/FL, IKS Industries WI) are all out-of-state and not passenger/school-bus operators. The only Harrington Park NJ 07640 transportation entity surfaced in directories is 'A&I Transportation Corporation' (limousine/shuttle) — distinct from IKS. Rank-2252 is a small intrastate NJ operator (PO Box 92, Harrington Park NJ 07640) likely operating school-bus or limo service without USDOT. Likely no USDOT (intrastate NJ).
